item_id: [str | auto] UNIQUE IDENTIFIER FOR THE ITEM

item_metadata.ingestion_time: [str | auto] TIMESTAMP OF WHEN THE ITEM WAS INGESTED (ISO 8601 FORMAT)

contributor.name: [str | optional] NAME OF THE CONTRIBUTOR
contributor.email: [str | optional] EMAIL ADDRESS OF THE CONTRIBUTOR

source.benchmark_name: [str | non-empty] NAME OF THE BENCHMARK OR DATASET
source.benchmark_version: [str | required] VERSION OF THE BENCHMARK OR DATASET
source.benchmark_url: [str | optional] URL TO THE BENCHMARK OR DATASET
source.benchmark_tags: [list[str] | optional] TAGS OR KEYWORDS ASSOCIATED WITH THE BENCHMARK OR DATASET

item_content.input: [list[str,dict] | non-empty] CONTENT OF THE ITEM, SUCH AS A QUESTION, A DIALOGUE, OR MULTIPLE CHOICE OPTIONS
item_content.references: [list[str,dict] | required] REFERENCES FOR THE EVALUATION METRIC

responses.response_id: [str | auto] UNIQUE IDENTIFIER FOR THE RESPONSE

model.name: [str | non-empty] NAME OF THE RESPONDENT MODEL
model.size: [str | optional] SIZE OF THE RESPONDENT MODEL

model_adaptation.system_instruction: [str | required] SYSTEM INSTRUCTION OR PROMPT USED TO ADAPT THE ITEM FOR THIS RESPONSE

generation_parameters.do_sample: [bool | required] WHETHER OR NOT TO USE SAMPLING, FALSE MEANS GREEDY DECODING
generation_parameters.top_k: [int | required] TOP-K VALUE USED FOR GENERATION
generation_parameters.top_p: [float | required] TOP-P VALUE USED FOR GENERATION
generation_parameters.max_tokens: [int | required] MAXIMUM NUMBER OF TOKENS GENERATED

tools.type: [str | required] TYPE OF THE TOOL, SUCH AS A SEARCH ENGINE
tools.content: [any | required] TOOL AVAILABLE TO THE MODEL

item_adaptation.request_input: [list[str,dict] | non-empty] ACTUAL INPUT PROVIDED TO THE MODEL FOR THIS RESPONSE, SUCH AS THE ADAPTED QUESTION OR DIALOGUE
item_adaptation.demonstrations: [list[str] | optional] DEMONSTRATIONS OR EXAMPLES PROVIDED TO THE MODEL FOR THIS RESPONSE

external_resources.type: [str | required] TYPE OF THE EXTERNAL RESOURCE
external_resources.content: [any | required] AVAILABLE EXTERNAL RESOURCES FROM THE TEST ENVIRONMENT

responses.response_content: [list[str,dict] | non-empty] CONTENT OF THE RESPONSE, SUCH AS THE MODEL'S ANSWER OR OUTPUT

metric.name: [str | non-empty] NAME OF THE EVALUATION METRIC
metric.models: [list[str] | required] MODELS OR ALGORITHMS USED TO COMPUTE THE EVALUATION METRIC

extra_artifacts.content: [any | required] ADDITIONAL ARTIFACT FOR SCORING THE RESPONSE

scores.value: [int,float,bool | non-empty] NUMERIC VALUE OF THE EVALUATION METRIC
